text: How long had the police taken to find his bicycle?
zh: 警察花了多长时间才找到他的自行车?
zh_hant: 警察花了多長時間才找到他的腳踏車?

text: Dan Robinson has been worried all week.
zh: 丹·罗宾逊这一整周都很担心。
zh_hant: 丹·羅賓遜這一整週都很擔心。

text: Last Tuesday he received a letter
zh: 上周二他收到了一封信,
zh_hant: 上週二他收到了一封信,

text: from the local police.
In the letter he was asked to call at the station.
zh: 信中要求他去警察局一趟。
zh_hant: 信中要求他去警察局一趟。

text: Dan wondered why
he was wanted by the police,
but he went to the station yesterday
zh: 但他昨天还是去了警察局,
zh_hant: 但他昨天還是去了警察局,

text: and now he is not worried anymore.
At the station,
he was told by a smiling policeman
zh: 一位面带微笑的警察告诉他,
zh_hant: 一位面帶微笑的警察告訴他,

text: that his bicycle had been found.
Five days ago, the policeman told him,
the bicycle was picked up in a small village
zh: 这辆自行车是在一个小村庄里被发现的,
zh_hant: 這輛腳踏車是在一個小村莊裡被發現的,

text: four hundred miles away.
It is now being sent to his home by train.
zh: 现在它正通过火车运送回他家。
zh_hant: 現在它正透過火車運送回他家。

text: Dan was most surprised
when he heard the news.
He was amused too,
because he never expected
the bicycle to be found.
zh: 这辆自行车还能被找到。
zh_hant: 這輛腳踏車還能被找到。

text: It was stolen twenty years ago
when Dan was a boy of fifteen!
